accepted.topic: Healthcare students: confirm whether you need BLS before clinicals
accepted.audience: UNCW-area nursing, pre-health, and healthcare students
accepted.message:
Healthcare students: confirm whether you need BLS before clinicals

Healthcare program requirements can be specific. If your paperwork says BLS Provider, a general CPR card may not be the right match.

For Wilmington, NC, 910CPR can help connect that reminder to practical AHA BLS Provider for healthcare students and providers.

https://910cpr.com/courses/aha-bls-provider.html
accepted.reason: Healthcare students often need BLS Provider training before clinical rotations, onboarding, or program milestones.
accepted.source_name: UNCW academic and health program cycle
accepted.course_angle: AHA BLS Provider for healthcare students and providers

accepted.message:
CFCC-area health science students: CPR vs BLS reminder

Before booking a class, check whether your program asks for BLS Provider rather than general CPR.

accepted.topic: Coastal preparedness includes first aid before help arrives
accepted.audience: coastal NC families, churches, workplaces, and neighborhood groups
accepted.message:
Coastal preparedness includes first aid before help arrives

A storm kit is more useful when someone nearby also knows basic first aid, CPR, and AED response.

For Coastal North Carolina, 910CPR can help connect that reminder to practical First Aid/CPR/AED readiness for the first few minutes.

https://910cpr.com/courses/hsi-first-aid-cpr-aed.html
accepted.reason: Storm planning is a recurring coastal topic, and emergency response can be delayed by weather or road conditions.
accepted.course_angle: First Aid/CPR/AED readiness for the first few minutes

accepted.topic: Pool season: CPR and AED readiness for neighborhoods
accepted.audience: HOA boards, pool committees, community managers, and neighborhood volunteers
accepted.message:
Pool season: CPR and AED readiness for neighborhoods

Before the pool gets busy, review who can start CPR, who knows where the AED is, and who can help while 911 is on the way.

For Southeastern North Carolina, 910CPR can help connect that reminder to practical Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED for community responders.

https://910cpr.com/courses/aha-heartsaver-first-aid-cpr-aed.html
accepted.reason: Pool season raises community interest in drowning prevention, CPR, AED access, and first response planning.
accepted.course_angle: Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED for community responders

accepted.topic: Church safety teams: AED and Sunday morning readiness
accepted.audience: church safety teams, ushers, greeters, and children's ministry volunteers
accepted.message:
Church safety teams: AED and Sunday morning readiness

If your church has an AED or a safety team, make sure the plan is understood before a Sunday morning emergency.

For Wilmington, NC region, 910CPR can help connect that reminder to practical Group CPR/AED and First Aid/CPR/AED training.

https://910cpr.com/courses/cpr-aed-first-aid-on-site-group-class.html
accepted.reason: Faith communities routinely gather large mixed-age groups and benefit from clear first response roles.
accepted.course_angle: Group CPR/AED and First Aid/CPR/AED training

accepted.topic: Workplace first aid kits need trained responders too
accepted.audience: small businesses, supervisors, safety coordinators, and front desk teams
accepted.message:
Workplace first aid kits need trained responders too

A stocked first aid kit is helpful, but a trained person standing near it is better.

For North Carolina workplaces, 910CPR can help connect that reminder to practical HSI First Aid CPR AED or group workplace training.

https://910cpr.com/courses/hsi-first-aid-cpr-aed.html
accepted.reason: Workplaces often have first aid supplies but fewer people trained to use them in time-sensitive emergencies.
accepted.source_name: OSHA medical and first aid readiness
accepted.course_angle: HSI First Aid CPR AED or group workplace training

accepted.topic: Parents and grandparents: practice infant choking response
accepted.audience: parents, grandparents, babysitters, and new families
accepted.message:
Parents and grandparents: practice infant choking response

Infant choking is not something families want to figure out for the first time during an emergency.

For Wilmington, NC region, 910CPR can help connect that reminder to practical Infant CPR and choking relief.

https://910cpr.com/courses/infant-cpr-and-choking-relief.html
accepted.reason: Infant choking response is a recurring caregiver concern and is best practiced before an emergency.

accepted.message:
Camp and childcare teams: summer CPR and pediatric first aid readiness
